channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Am I fucked if I'm put on a PIP? — 32 replies — 128.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Am I fucked if I'm put on a PIP?

Open thread • Replies: 32 • Updated: 2026-06-06 02:26 UTC

OP

Been at a fortune 500 company for 4 years. No problems until today. I'm a dev btw. Get random email from my manager today about a performance meeting. No mention of my performance prior to this aside from a comment about me not always being in the office as much and working from home.

Thing is I've been crushing it at work and been getting nothing but praise from clients and managers. Just last week the manager from the PIP meeting was telling me I'm being moved to another team because I completed so much work on the current one and they need my assistance with another dev team. Now he's saying bs out his ass about performance. And unironically while I'm on the call with him and hr today about this PIP bullshit another manager pinged me to tell me several clients were telling him how much they love working with me

It feels like the goals in the PIP are set up to make me fail. They basically want me working across 3 teams all at once now along with some online classes because I "lack skills" even though I've taken their skill assessment tests and scored proficient on them. I honestly hate the place so I'm not worried and I've got some investments I can liquidate to help me out with bills until I figure something out or get another job. I'm just so confused like what in the fuck caused this? Not only have I done what's been asked of me but I complete more work than others and that's easy to prove. They've got the metrics so what the fuck. Now I gotta look for another tech job in this bs industry.

Early replies (first 3)

62325457
Why were you on a PIP to begin with?
Sounds like you were underperforming before this current stretch

62325483
>>62325457
I just got placed on it today. No ones made a negative comment on my performance aside from me not always being in the office but I would still complete all the work including additional tasks without being asked. Feels targeted

62325486
They're trying to get rid of you for some reason. If I had to guess they're going to replace you with a team of Indians for a quarter of the cost

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62325489
Sorry I misread you are on a PIP now. Did they provide any evidence of you lacking skills and poor performance? I would make sure you get some more details. Normally if you're on PIP they're doing it in preparation to let you go

62325495
>>62325483
and that comment about being in office was from last week and I instantly starting going in more to meet the attendance requirement

62325507
>>62325495
Yeah if you were just working from home with impunity nothing pisses off a middle manager useless eater more. They think you think you're hot shit and wanna see you either begging to keep your job or going somewhere else

62325535
>>62325489
Yeah, that's what I figured I'm just struggling to understand why but I guess the answer to that may not be as important.

I asked them a ton of questions about it and they kept beating around the bush or giving me bs answers. I.e. we migrated from azure to github and I asked what the new pipeline was called for a certain deployment and my manager tells me that shows I'm not an expert. Just utter bs. The more I talk about it the more I'm starting to think that yeah they just want to replace me with another Indian like >>62325486
said. They do that a lot here. Otherwise it just doesn't make sense to me. He made multiple comments about my lack of knowledge even though I've trained multiple people and he himself uses me as support periodically across different teams when theres a fuck up from someone else. I guess I've answered my own question

62325573
>>62325535
Just ask your manager for help getting off the PIP. If they agree then just meet the requirements and stay, if they don't have time or they won't help then they've already decided to can your ass and it's better to just start looking for a job now than get the scarlet letter of underperformance on your record.

62325580
>>62325535
Honestly fuck that job. I'd start looking for a new job asap. They're trying to get you to beg, study and do more work for no personal gain. Never go and beyond if it doesn't come with increased pay

62325581
>>62325535
sorry bro, you answered your own question

mid-level & senior roles get harder to get by the month. im sure you read hackernews, just be ready to accept a large paycut.

62325593
>>62325409
>They basically want me working across 3 teams all at once now along with some online classes because I "lack skills"
You are being set up to fail.
If you want to be a pain in the ass, go to a doctor and say you have burnout/depression/PTSD/whatever then say you need to take disability leave. The leave will freeze your PIP essentially (for a little bit).

62325660
>>62325483
>but I would still complete all the work including additional tasks without being asked
Retard.

62325661
>>62325593
UK is such a backwards country

62325667
>>62325409
PIP means you're pretty much fired. Take the severance and start applying.

62325680
>>62325409
When you're on a PIP it's time to DIP
If the company were not legally required to do them you would already be fired

62325693
Also, don't get caught up with trying to "prove them wrong". Your manager will put you under a microscope and raise subjective points.

The best "fuck you" is to extend the process for as long as possible to job search while demonstrating no emotional reaction.

62325746
They want to pay some jeets 5 bucks an hour

62325749
Get an attorney and file complaints about this to your state's labor board and OSHA. It won't stop you being fired but you can get a big settlement on your way out.

Don't worry about the cost of an attorney they'll take their cut from your settlement if they're good and you have a proper case. Most will at least review your situation at no up front cost and tell you if it's something they're interested in or not.

Also start documenting all contact you have with your supervisor in a work diary. Seriously. That's evidence for court later, and protects you from more HR shenanigans (and gives you ammo against them). Yes, your inane scribbles count as evidence in court.

Good luck.
t. former HRfag

62325780
PIP = paid interviewing period

62325861
>>62325780
I was about to ask. You guys gots da real jobz.

62325881
>>62325409
they probably found out you post on 4chan

yes, this is sufficient reason to fire someone with security access

62325998
>>62325409
>Law 1: Never Outshine the Master
>Everyone has insecurities. When you show yourself in the world and display your talents, you naturally stir up all kinds of resentment, envy, and other manifestations of insecurity
Had this happen to me, more than once, the most recent one was my last job which was the most meaningless tier job ive had so far but it had that prestigious status so the games were amplified (i wasnt in the right headspace to clock the maneuvers early enough), lies were invented then i got canned. Listen big guy your whole situation sounds like this, you dont bow down and you are a rock solid unit, in the russian mob they'd tat your knees for not being a bitch and getting on all fours, in the corporate world they want a mf to be a hoe to a degree because guess what the higher ups are hoes to a degree therefore instead of matching the mirror the hoes attack it. This shit will play out the same way over and over again untill you learn the mechanism, i have talents in a few areas myself and excell in them as compared to my peers, guess what same shit ina different envirenoment every single time. If you want to get it Robert Greene first then Carl Jung and youll get the gist. Btw congratulations on being a proper rock solid man, dont let em take away your advantageous position as a fuck you ima martyr myself here no no extend that shit as far out as possible in terms of extracting financial benefits for yourself but do start working on your exit plan and contingency plans should alterations in the process arise today. When they demand you to give away something thats actually valuable to you like your dignity and there is no way to stay vague and lead them on then you make your exit move. I know for a fact you already know all of this but please do not underestimate the power of something uplifting actually uplifting you and the effect of letting things into your perception which will affect you in ways you can not 100% foresee. Bona fortuna

62326047
>>62325409
Anon do not let em off the hook easy it will be you letting them punk you and that shit will eat your whole fucking self for a loooooooong time. Fuck what i wrote, listen to this super based mf >>62325749
and fucking do it. Theese subhumans are trying to take food off your table do not let them get away with it for cheap DONT thats how theese fucks have the gull to do it becauae most mfs will go the ath of least resistamce. Your earned money is fucking yours and everybody is trying to deny you your won poker chips which you won fair and square. Please please please do not let a faggot in a suit rob you of your shit dont let them demoralize you as it will seem so at first. No matter hoe much pushback you can muster up do it and push the fuck back itll make you love woth yourself that much better and will benefit your future oppertunities (you'll be able to look at yoirself in the mirror and be proud is what i mean). Playing the 007 game in the background while giving them the fassade they want to see without any signal on your true intentions is less tiring than getting fucked and accepting the fucking because you were convinced to do so by them weaponizing your conciemce and culture and morality or worse your weaks/blindspots against you, been there itll eat you up for months on end if not fucking years. That being said, bona fortuna OP

>>62325749
Anon i eill ask for OP, could you by any chance provide more informational content and possibly uplifting signaling for OP. What you already did is the most based righteous shit i have seen in a fucking while. Shit you got my ass uplifted and ive been in a downward spiral for 3 weeks now. I think i speak for everybody when i say this, thank you and thank youf being this based and this much of a proper role model

62326064
>>62325495
>>62325409
OP you really need to call their bluff. Tell them you disagree with the PIP, you know your worth and want your salary to double or you're leaving.
The stupid bitch HR whore that came up with this stupid plan will have it blow up in her stupid face.

62326101
>>62325667
>>62325680
>>62325780
^ This. OP you're donezo. Start interviewing/preparing now.

62326110
>>62325409
glad that I've worked for myself since 1993 and have no idea what a PIP is.

62326118
>>62326110
I only know because I lurk here

I started working for myself in 1999 and can't imagine putting up with half the shit people talk about here. I think back in our day we called it "getting written up," which was just your ten minute warning before getting fired.

62326230
>>62325409
yes, they’re absolutely going to fire you, they’re just getting their legal ducks in a row first. Start preparing all your evidence now that the firing is unjustified (emails from customers & management praising you, KPIs you’re meeting / exceeding) and give it to a lawyer once you’re fired.
Don’t sign the severance package that says you can’t sue, all the severance package does is saves them from paying you more in unemployment.

62326238
>>62325535
The answer isn’t important. A lot of managers used to be retarded (bell curve) but now nearly all are retarded.
It could be some female except 5 levels above you who has decided to axe the entire department or wants all white males fired. You just don’t know.

62326251
In the US an employee can generally be fired for any reason or no reason at all. As long as OP isn't fired for an illegal reason (discrimination, retaliation) he probably can't sue. Doesn't matter if he's great at his job. Employers are allowed to fire great employees if they want

62326255
it’s easier solely about RTO or they are planning to outsource your job. in my experience we’ve never put someone on a PIP unless we were planning to get rid of them. the PIP was just a formality to check all of the boxes.

62326289
>>62326251
discrimination should be easy to prove when they’re firing only white male developers and hiring only indians. Just ask to see HR’s emails concerning the layoffs where they got a directive from management to fire all the americans.
Also OP, take all your sick leave now and abuse unlimited PTO if you have it

62324515

62325736

whos still in, was asking for it!

62325789

62325871

62325872
>>62322671

62325898

It fired. But it basically touched it, then shot back up, kicking me out.

62326098

62326132

62326135

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-06-06 02:19 UTC

Comfy cozy as the scams burn

Early replies (first 3)

62322535
>>62322509

62322567
>>62322535
this

62322663
>>62322535
>>62322567
Kikes

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62323108
>>62322509
stop spoonfeeding the retards thanks

62325055
>>62323108
No. Doing my part to crush the kikes.

62325187

62325268
>>62325187
Zero.zerozero

62325890
Who is dumping so much money into Zcrap?

62325904
>>62322509
>buy my bag
Fucking shameless nigger. Btw buy real coin, not some zoomer shit, it'll make you brown and gay.

62325905
>>62322509
true, a slow burn
>>62325890
people that want the price to go up as they sell minted tokens?

62325974
>XMR currently tanking harder than pretty much anything else on the market right now
fucking why

62326037
>>62322509
No thanks, crypto is dead. I took profit a few days ago before the dump. Only wish I had exited a couple weeks ago.
Enjoy your jeet scam coins, niggers!

62326134
>>62325187
$25000

62326140
>>62325187
higher than any other coin since its the only one with a fucking usecase

62326263
>>62326140
But how valuable is that? If you’re trading something you should have an idea at which price to buy and sell so that you don’t panic buy and sell.

climb now!

one hundred!

62326268

62326090

62326125

62326164

item.title: >mfw the AI scam bubble collapses and they all come crawlin' back to THE KING — 6 replies — 11.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
>mfw the AI scam bubble collapses and they all come crawlin' back to THE KING

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-06 01:55 UTC

OP

>mfw the AI scam bubble collapses and they all come crawlin' back to THE KING

Early replies (first 3)

62325858
>>62325849
BTC above $1,000,000 in 2029, but with a bumpy road ahead. Only those whose faith is pure will be rewarded…

62325865
>>62325849
??????
Saylor killed Bitcoin.

62325866
I have seen some stock fags say energy and robotics are the next rotation. I really hate stock fags, they all seem like pussys that post simpsons and how i met your mother gifs..thats neither here nor there though.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62325892
>>62325866

The chips in the robots are still AI like the figure robot it runs off an nvidia chip. Semis will only grow and will never stop for the foreseeable next 10 years as tech advances with self driving cars, house robots until we get real life detroit become human.

Just look at the progress from 2012 to 2026 for smartphone tech and semis. Tech will only get more advanced.

62326161
>>62325866
I think it will take a little longer for robotics but yeah they’re definitely right, I mean isn’t it obvious? DCAing for the next 4 years and probably more seems like the most genius play ever to me

62326174
Trump just announced the US will part nationalize AI companies. The bubble will continue and when it collapses you will pay for it

item.title: >A new BILLION dollar defense startup which builds hypersonic weapons, gliders, satellites, and munitions is owned by a… — 6 replies — 10.8/hr

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-06-06 01:54 UTC

OP

>A new BILLION dollar defense startup which builds hypersonic weapons, gliders, satellites, and munitions is owned by a 22 year old MIT dropout and was founded when he was just eighteen (18) years old.
Well /biz/, what’s your excuse this time?
>muh singularity
Internet funny money is not supposed to be worth millions of market capitalization as it has no real world use and will never have utility.

Early replies (first 3)

62325399
>>62325389
How many of these things have they actually built?

62325419
Im too busy dealing in the real world. Im sure the 18 year old whizz kid has family member on a defense contractor board or something.

62325425
>>62325389
Early life?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62325430
>>62325425
This

62325441
>>62325419
Honestly, it’s because he’s in Cali where investors are easier to come by and are going all in on deftech the past few years.
He does also actually have some demo products, not devaluing his work. But the speed of investment is so Cali it hurts

62326167
>>62325399

>>62325419

item.title: MR CRYPTO PRESIDENT — 3 replies — 4.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
MR CRYPTO PRESIDENT

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-06-06 01:43 UTC

OP

PLEASE NO MORE WINNING I'LL SUCK YOUR DICK I'LL EAT YOUR FUCKING SHIT

Early replies (first 3)

item.title: For 9 years ETH has held the #2 spot, but now the flippening has occurred. — 4 replies — 1.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
For 9 years ETH has held the #2 spot, but now the flippening has occurred.

OP

For 9 years ETH has held the #2 spot, but now the flippening has occurred.

62324744
yeah because proof of steak (grilling) is retarded and the mainchain is bloated.

62324773
>>62324730

62324787
>>62324773
